title: Recruiter Agentic AI Depth Questions
summary: Recruiter-oriented question set for testing Joz's technical depth in agentic AI architecture and production AI systems.

verification.notes: Aligned with the existing verified agentic AI architecture records and current router answers.

claims: Joz can be positioned as hands-on in agentic AI architecture rather than only strategic.
The strongest technical framing is the full operating model of enterprise agents across retrieval, reasoning, execution, verification, and governance.
Recruiter answers should distinguish Joz from prompt-only AI profiles.
proof_points: Existing architecture records cover orchestration, RAG, embeddings, memory, ACL-aware retrieval, verification, and observability.
Current Joz LLM and MarketClue work provide live-system relevance.
